content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the additive scenario fixture in src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs plus the supporting helpers added to test_support/br.rs, bv.rs, and fixtures.rs. The fixture materializes a Ready milestone via the real service, writes a production-shaped .beads/issues.jsonl, and wires dispatch-driven MockBrAdapter/MockBvAdapter mocks that reload from disk before each operation. The smoke test verifies artifacts, bead ordering, ready-queue advancement through close mutations, create/dep-add wiring, working-directory enforcement, and deterministic dangling-dependency errors. cargo test, cargo fmt --check, and nix build all pass; cargo clippy warnings are pre-existing in master (verified by checking out the merge base 9207bb0c) and are not introduced by this change. The Arc<Mutex<ScenarioState>> is std::sync but all locks are released before any .await, so there is no await-holding-lock hazard. Mock dispatch handlers correctly fall through to the queued-response path when a command is unmatched. No correctness, safety, or robustness issues worth flagging.

## Amendments

None.
